---
title: "Visualization for DE and GSEA analysis"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(conflicted)
conflict_prefer("select", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("rename", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("count", "dplyr")

all_results <- bind_rows(
  readRDS("bgee_gtex_combined_model_results.rds"),
  readRDS("results_mouse.rds"),
  readRDS("results_pig.rds"),
)

# DEGs by variable
all_results %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05) %>%
  count(species, organ, variable) %>%
  arrange(variable, desc(n))

# side DEGS
side_degs <- all_results %>%
  filter(variable == "side", padj < 0.05)

# signal and directional bias
side_degs %>%
     group_by(species, organ) %>%
     summarise(
         n = n(),
         median_abs_lfc = median(abs(log2FoldChange)),
         pct_up = mean(log2FoldChange > 0) * 100
     ) %>%
     arrange(desc(n))
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(forcats)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)

theme_pres <- function(base_size = 13) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey93"),
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 3, margin = margin(b = 4)),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey45", size = base_size - 1, margin = margin(b = 10)),
      axis.text     = element_text(color = "grey20"),
      axis.title    = element_text(color = "grey30", size = base_size - 1),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text   = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      plot.margin   = margin(15, 20, 15, 15),
      plot.caption  = element_text(color = "grey60", size = 9, hjust = 0)
    )
}

PAL <- list(
  alt     = "#4D4D4D", 
  primary = "#4D4D4D" 
)

# highlight adrenal cortex outlier points
p1_data <- side_degs %>%
  mutate(
    is_adrenal = organ == "Adrenal Gland Cortex",
    organ_short = case_when(
      organ == "Adrenal Gland Cortex" ~ "Adrenal\nCortex",
      organ == "Adrenal Gland Whole"  ~ "Adrenal\nWhole",
      organ == "Adipose Tissue"       ~ "Adipose",
      organ == "Blood Vessel"         ~ "Blood\nVessel",
      organ == "heart ventricle" & species == "Mus_musculus" ~ "Heart\nVentricle (Mouse)",
      organ == "heart ventricle" & species == "Sus_scrofa"   ~ "Heart\nVentricle (Pig)",
      TRUE ~ organ
    )
  ) 

p1 <- p1_data %>%
  mutate(
    organ_short = fct_reorder(organ_short, abs(log2FoldChange), median),
    organ_short = fct_relevel(organ_short,
  "Heart\nVentricle (Mouse)",
  "Heart\nVentricle (Pig)",
  after = 0
)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x     = organ_short,
    y     = log2FoldChange,
    color = is_adrenal,
    alpha = is_adrenal
  )) + geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 0.9) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(-5, 5), linetype = "dashed",
             color = PAL$alt, linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = PAL$primary, "TRUE" = PAL$alt)) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 0.35, "TRUE" = 0.9)) + 
  coord_flip() +
  guides(color = "none", alpha = "none") +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = "log2 Fold Change (R vs L)"
  ) +
  theme_pres()

dir.create("results/figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

ggsave("DEG_dist.pdf",  p1, path = "results/figures", width = 10, height = 6)

```

```{r alt-contig contamination across human organs}

library(biomaRt)
mart <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")

adrenal_genes <- side_degs %>%
  filter(organ == "Adrenal Gland Cortex") %>%
  pull(gene)

getBM(
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol", "gene_biotype", "chromosome_name"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  values = adrenal_genes,
  mart = mart
)

# alt-contig contamination across all other organs
side_degs <- all_results %>%
  filter(variable == "side", padj < 0.05)

sig_genes <- side_degs %>% pull(gene) %>% unique()

gene_info <- getBM(
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol", "gene_biotype", "chromosome_name"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  values = sig_genes,
  mart = mart,
  
)

# flag alt contigs
gene_info %>%
  mutate(is_primary = chromosome_name %in% c(as.character(1:22), "X", "Y", "MT")) %>%
  count(is_primary)

# Get the clean gene list
primary_genes <- gene_info %>%
  filter(chromosome_name %in% c(as.character(1:22), "X", "Y", "MT")) %>%
  pull(ensembl_gene_id)

# Filter side DEGs to primary assembly only
side_degs_clean <- side_degs %>%
  filter(gene %in% primary_genes)

# check counts per organ
side_degs_clean %>%
  count(species, organ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

saveRDS(side_degs_clean, "results/31-03-human_side_degs_clean.rds")
```

```{r mouse and pig alt contig contamination}

# Mouse
mart_mouse <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "mmusculus_gene_ensembl")
mouse_genes <- side_degs %>% 
  filter(species == "Mus_musculus") %>% 
  pull(gene) %>% unique()

mouse_gene_info <- getBM(
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "mgi_symbol", "gene_biotype", "chromosome_name"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  values = mouse_genes,
  mart = mart_mouse
)

# Pig
mart_pig <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "sscrofa_gene_ensembl")
pig_genes <- side_degs %>% 
  filter(species == "Sus_scrofa") %>% 
  pull(gene) %>% unique()

pig_gene_info <- getBM(
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol", "gene_biotype", "chromosome_name"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  values = pig_genes,
  mart = mart_pig
)

# Check alt contig contamination per species
mouse_gene_info %>%
  mutate(is_primary = chromosome_name %in% c(as.character(1:19), "X", "Y", "MT")) %>%
  dplyr::count(is_primary)

pig_gene_info %>%
  mutate(is_primary = chromosome_name %in% c(as.character(1:18), "X", "Y", "MT")) %>%
  dplyr::count(is_primary)

```

```{r before and after filtering, per organ}
PAL <- list(
  before  = "grey75",
  after   = "#2166AC"
)

before_after_bar <- bind_rows(
  side_degs %>%
    filter(species == "Homo_sapiens") %>%
    count(organ) %>%
    mutate(filter = "Before"),
  side_degs_clean %>%
    filter(species == "Homo_sapiens") %>%
    count(organ) %>%
    mutate(filter = "After")
) %>%
  mutate(
    filter = factor(filter, levels = c("Before", "After")),
    organ  = fct_reorder(organ, n, max)
  )

p2 <- ggplot(before_after_bar,
                      aes(x = organ, y = n, fill = filter)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = n),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
    vjust = -0.4, size = 3, color = "grey30"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Before" = PAL$before,
    "After"  = PAL$after
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = "Number of significant DEGs (padj < 0.05)",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_pres() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )

ggsave("DEG_before_after_filtering.pdf", p2, path = "results/figures", width = 10, height = 6)

```

```{r DEG side bias}
PAL <- list(
  left    = "#4D4D4D",   # Left > Right
  right   = "grey75"   # Right > Left
)

p3_total <- side_degs %>%
  filter(organ != "heart ventricle") %>%
  group_by(species, organ) %>%
  summarise(
    n_right = sum(log2FoldChange > 0),
    n_left  = sum(log2FoldChange < 0),
    n_total = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_total >= 3) %>%
  filter(n_total >= 3) %>%
  mutate(
    binom_p = mapply(function(r, total) binom.test(r, total, p = 0.5)$p.value,
                     n_right, n_total),
    sig_label = case_when(
      binom_p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      binom_p < 0.01  ~ "**",
      binom_p < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE            ~ ""
    ),
    tissue_label = case_when(
      TRUE ~ organ
    ),
    label_x = ifelse(n_right >= n_left, n_right, -n_left),
    hjust_val = ifelse(n_right >= n_left, -0.15, 1.15)
  )

# Long format for bars
p3_data <- p3_total %>%
  pivot_longer(c(n_right, n_left), names_to = "direction", values_to = "n") %>%
  mutate(
    n_plot    = ifelse(direction == "n_left", -n, n),
    direction = ifelse(direction == "n_right", "Right biased", "Left biased"),
    direction = factor(direction, levels = c("Left biased", "Right biased"))
  )

p3 <- p3_data %>%
  mutate(tissue_label = fct_reorder(tissue_label, abs(n_plot), sum)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = n_plot, y = tissue_label, fill = direction)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.65) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey20", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_text(
    data = p3_total %>%
      mutate(tissue_label = fct_reorder(tissue_label, n_total)),
    aes(x = label_x, y = tissue_label,
        label = paste0(n_total, " ", sig_label),
        hjust = hjust_val),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 2.5, color = "grey30"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Left biased" = PAL$left, "Right biased" = PAL$right)) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = function(x) abs(x),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.15, 0.15))
  ) +
  labs(
    # title    = ""
    x = "Number of DEGs", y = NULL, fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_pres() +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()) +
  theme(
  panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
  legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 8)) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=8),
        axis.title=element_text(size=10))

ggsave("DEG_side_bias.pdf", p3, path = "results/figures", width = 10, height = 6)

```

```{r GSEA data}

all_gsea <- read.csv("tissue_specific_gsea.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) 

all_gsea <- all_gsea %>%
  mutate(
    leadingEdge = str_extract_all(leadingEdge, "ENSG\\d+|ENSMUSG\\d+|ENSSSCG\\d+"),
    le_size = lengths(leadingEdge)
  )
summary(all_gsea$le_size)

gsea_final <- all_gsea %>%
  filter(
    !organ %in% "heart ventricle", !is.na(NES), le_size >= 10)

contamination <- "intermediate filament organization"
cont_organs <- c("Nerve")

gsea_cleaned <- gsea_final %>%
  filter(!(pathway %in% contamination & organ %in% cont_organs))

pathway_tissue_counts <- gsea_cleaned %>%
  filter(!is.na(NES)) %>%
  mutate(tissue_label = paste(species, organ, sep = "\n")) %>%
  group_by(pathway) %>%
  summarise(
    n_tissues_sig    = sum(padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_tissues_total  = n_distinct(tissue_label),
    mean_abs_NES     = mean(abs(NES), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

top20_shared <- pathway_tissue_counts %>%
  filter(n_tissues_sig >= 2) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_tissues_sig), desc(mean_abs_NES)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 50) %>%
  pull(pathway)

shared_data <- gsea_cleaned %>%
  filter(!is.na(NES), pathway %in% top20_shared) %>%
  mutate(
    tissue_label  = paste(species, organ, sep = "\n"),
    abs_NES       = abs(NES),
    size    = size,
    pathway_short = str_wrap(pathway, 55),
    is_sig        = padj < 0.05,
  )

pathway_order <- shared_data %>%
  filter(is_sig) %>%
  group_by(pathway_short) %>%
  summarise(n_sig = n_distinct(tissue_label),
            mean_NES = mean(abs_NES), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(n_sig, mean_NES) %>%
  pull(pathway_short)

tissue_order <- sort(unique(shared_data$tissue_label))

shared_data <- shared_data %>%
  mutate(
    pathway_short = factor(pathway_short, levels = pathway_order),
    tissue_label  = factor(tissue_label,  levels = tissue_order)
  )
```

```{r GSEA visualizations}

library(tidytext)
library(ggsci)
library(ggthemes)

dot_theme <- function(base = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold", color = "gray15",
                                      hjust = 0.5, lineheight = 0.9),
      axis.text.y      = element_text(size = 9, color = "gray10", hjust = 1),
      plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 9.5, hjust = 0.5, color = "gray50",
                                      margin = margin(b = 10)),
      strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, color = "gray10"),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray88", color = NA),
      legend.position  = "right",
      legend.title     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
      legend.text      = element_text(size = 8),
      panel.grid       = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.spacing    = unit(1, "lines"),
      plot.margin      = margin(12, 12, 12, 12)
    )
}

dot_scales <- function() {
  list(
    scale_color_gradientn(
      colors = c("#FFFFCC", "#FEB24C", "#E31A1C"),
      name   = "| NES |",
      limits = c(0, NA)
    ),
    scale_size_continuous(
      name   = "size",
      range  = c(2, 9),
      breaks = c(2, 4, 6, 8, 10)
    ),
    guides(
      color = guide_colorbar(barwidth = 0.8, barheight = 6, order = 1),
      size  = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "gray40"), order = 2)
    )
  )
}

p_shared <- ggplot(shared_data, aes(x = tissue_label, y = pathway_short)) +
  geom_tile(
    data = expand.grid(tissue_label  = levels(shared_data$tissue_label),
                       pathway_short = levels(shared_data$pathway_short)),
    aes(x = tissue_label, y = pathway_short),
    fill = "gray96", color = "gray88", linewidth = 0.3, inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_point(data = filter(shared_data, !is_sig),
             aes(size = size), color = "gray80", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_point(data = filter(shared_data, is_sig),
             aes(size = size, color = abs_NES), alpha = 0.9) +
  dot_scales() +
  labs(
    # title    = "Shared L/R Asymmetry Programs",
       x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  dot_theme()

ggsave("GSEA_shared_filtered.pdf", p_shared, path = "results/figures", width  = max(10, 1.2 * n_distinct(shared_data$tissue_label) + 4),
       height = 10, limitsize = FALSE)

```


```{r GSEA per tissue, all_organs}
pathway_organ_counts <- gsea_final %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05, !is.na(NES)) %>%
  group_by(pathway) %>%
  summarise(n_organs = n_distinct(organ), .groups = "drop")

skin_contamination <- c("keratinization", "epidermis development", "epithelial cell development", "morphogenesis of an epithelium", "skin development", "intermediate filament organization", "keratinocyte differentiation", "epithelial cell differentiation")

contaminated_organs <- c("Nerve", "Muscle", "Testis")

all_specific_data <- gsea_final %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05, !is.na(NES), le_size >= 1,
         !(pathway %in% skin_contamination & organ %in% contaminated_organs)) %>%
  left_join(pathway_organ_counts, by = "pathway") %>%
  mutate(
    organ = ifelse(organ == "heart ventricle", "Heart Ventricle", organ),
    tissue_label  = paste(species, organ, sep = "\n"),
    abs_NES       = abs(NES),
    pathway_short = str_wrap(pathway, 55)
  ) %>%
  group_by(organ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs_NES), n_organs) %>%   # strongest then most specific first 
  slice_head(n = 8) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    organ         = factor(organ, levels = sort(unique(organ))),
    pathway_short = reorder_within(pathway_short, abs_NES, organ)
  )

n_organs <- n_distinct(all_specific_data$organ)

p_specific <- ggplot(all_specific_data,
                     aes(x = species, y = pathway_short)) +
  geom_tile(fill = "gray96", color = "gray88", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(aes(size = size, color = abs_NES), alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~organ, scales = "free", ncol = 2) +
  scale_y_reordered() +
  dot_scales() +
  labs(
    # title    = "Organ-Specific Pathways",
       x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  dot_theme()

ggsave("GSEA_organ_specific_supp.pdf", 
       path = "results/figures",
       width = 16, height = 5 * ceiling(n_organs / 3), limitsize = FALSE)

```


```{r recurrent leading edge genes}
library(biomaRt)

leading_edges <- gsea_final %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05, !(pathway %in% skin_contamination & organ %in% contaminated_organs)) %>%
  tidyr::unnest(leadingEdge) %>%
  rename(gene = leadingEdge) %>%
  dplyr::select(species, organ, pathway, NES, padj, gene)

# Genes that appear in the leading edge of at least one significant GSEA pathway in at least 2 different organs
shared_genes_raw <- leading_edges %>%
  filter(species == "Homo_sapiens") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, organ) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(gene) %>%
  summarise(
    n_tissues = n_distinct(organ),
    organs    = paste(sort(unique(organ)), collapse = ", "),
    .groups   = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_tissues >= 2)

# annotate shared leading edge genes

mart <- useEnsembl("genes", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl", mirror = "useast")

shared_leading_annotation <- getBM(
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol",
                 "gene_biotype", "description"),
  filters    = "ensembl_gene_id",
  values     = shared_genes_raw$gene %>% unique(),
  mart       = mart) %>%
  mutate(description = gsub("\\s*\\[.*\\]", "", description))

saveRDS(shared_leading_annotation, "results/shared_leading_annotation.rds")

shared_clean <- shared_genes_raw %>%
  left_join(
    shared_leading_annotation %>%
      dplyr::select(ensembl_gene_id, hgnc_symbol, gene_biotype, description),
    by = c("gene" = "ensembl_gene_id")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    leading_edges %>%
      filter(species == "Homo_sapiens") %>%
      group_by(gene) %>%
      summarise(pathways = paste(sort(unique(pathway)), collapse = "; "),
                .groups = "drop"),
    by = "gene"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(hgnc_symbol), hgnc_symbol != "") %>%
  mutate(
    theme = case_when(
      grepl("keratin|epiderm|filament|epithelial|morphogen|skin",
            pathways, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Epithelium development (GO:0060429)",
      grepl("immune|antigen|inflamm|antimicro|immunoglob|T cell|chemotax|lymphocyte|leukocyte",
            pathways, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Immune system process (GO:0002376)",
      grepl("translation|ribosom|cytoplasmic translation",
        pathways, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Translation (GO:0006412)",
      TRUE ~ "Other biological process"
    )
  )
print(shared_clean[1,])
```

```{r Alluvial plot}

theme_cols <- c(
  "Epithelium development (GO:0060429)" = "#E08214",
  "Immune system process (GO:0002376)" = "#2166AC",
  "Translation (GO:0006412)"            = "#35978F",
  "Other biological process" = "grey60",
  "tissue"                = "grey20"
)

tissue_cols <- shared_clean %>%
  tidyr::separate_rows(organs, sep = ", ") %>%
  dplyr::count(organs) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  pull(organs)

top_genes_per_theme <- shared_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(hgnc_symbol)) %>%
  group_by(theme) %>%
  slice_max(n_tissues, n = 6) %>%
  pull(hgnc_symbol) %>%
  unique()

alluvial_data <- shared_clean %>%
  filter(hgnc_symbol %in% top_genes_per_theme) %>%
  tidyr::separate_rows(organs, sep = ", ") %>%
  dplyr::count(theme, hgnc_symbol, organs) %>%
  mutate(
    theme = str_wrap(theme, width = 20),
    theme = factor(theme, levels = str_wrap(c(
      "Epithelium development (GO:0060429)",
      "Immune system process (GO:0002376)",
      "Translation (GO:0006412)",
      "Other biological process"
    ), width = 20)),
    organ       = factor(organs, levels = tissue_cols),
    hgnc_symbol = fct_reorder(hgnc_symbol, n, sum)
  )

# Update theme_cols to match wrapped names
theme_cols_wrapped <- setNames(
  theme_cols,
  str_wrap(names(theme_cols), width = 20)
)

p_alluvial <- ggplot(alluvial_data,
                     aes(axis1 = theme,
                         axis2 = hgnc_symbol,
                         axis3 = organ,
                         y     = n)) +
  geom_alluvium(
    aes(fill = theme),
    alpha = 0.65, width = 0.3, knot.pos = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_stratum(
    width = 0.3, color = "white", linewidth = 0.5,
    aes(fill = after_stat(stratum) %in% levels(alluvial_data$theme))
  ) +
  geom_text(
    stat = "stratum",
    aes(label = after_stat(stratum)),
    size = 3, fontface = "bold", color = "grey15"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      theme_cols_wrapped,
      "TRUE"  = "grey85",
      "FALSE" = "grey92"
    ),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    limits = c("GO biological process", "Gene", "Organ"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.05))
  ) +
  labs(
    # title    = "Structural and immune programs flow to distinct tissues",
    # subtitle = "Top 6 hub genes per GO parent process",
    x = NULL, y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_void(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15,
                                   margin = margin(b = 4), hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle   = element_text(color = "grey45", size = 11,
                                   margin = margin(b = 10), hjust = 0.5),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    axis.text.x     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12,
                                   color = "grey30"),
    plot.margin     = margin(20, 40, 20, 40)
  )

ggsave("results/figures/GSEA_G2_alluvial_filtered.pdf", p_alluvial, width = 12, height = 10)

```

```{r GSEA mouse and pig}
organ_specific_set <- pathway_tissue_counts %>%
  pull(pathway)

heart_data <- all_gsea %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05, !is.na(NES), pathway %in% organ_specific_set) %>%
  mutate(
    organ = ifelse(organ == "heart ventricle", "Heart Ventricle", organ)
  ) %>%
  filter(organ == "Heart Ventricle") %>%
  mutate(
    tissue_label  = paste(species, organ, sep = "\n"),
    abs_NES       = abs(NES),
    size    = size,
    pathway_short = str_wrap(pathway, 55)
  ) %>%
  group_by(tissue_label) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs_NES, n = 5) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    organ         = factor(organ, levels = sort(unique(organ))),
    pathway_short = reorder_within(pathway_short, abs_NES, organ)
  )

p_heart <- ggplot(heart_data,
                     aes(x = species, y = pathway_short)) +
  geom_tile(fill = "gray96", color = "gray88", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(aes(size = size, color = abs_NES), alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~organ, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  scale_y_reordered() +
  dot_scales() +
  labs(
    # title    = "",
       x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  dot_theme()

ggsave("GSEA_heart_ventricle.pdf", p_heart, path = "results/figures",
       width = 12, height = 10)

```
